title: How long you can work on work visas :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## How long you can work on work visas
Check how long you can stay in New Zealand on an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), Post Study Work Visa or Specific Purpose Work Visa.
- How long you can stay on an AEWV The total time you can stay in New Zealand on 1 or more Accredited Employer Work Visas (AEWV) – also called your maximum continuous stay — changes depending on your job and whether the visa is a seasonal AEWV.

## How long you can stay on an AEWV
The total time you can stay in New Zealand on 1 or more Accredited Employer Work Visas (AEWV) – also called your maximum continuous stay — changes depending on your job and whether the visa is a seasonal AEWV.
- Applying for another AEWV If your Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) is expiring, check if you can get another AEWV and how to apply.

## Applying for another AEWV
If your Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) is expiring, check if you can get another AEWV and how to apply.
- How long you can stay on a Post Study Work Visa You can get a Post Study Work Visa for up to 3 years depending on your situation.

## How long you can stay on a Post Study Work Visa
You can get a Post Study Work Visa for up to 3 years depending on your situation.
- How long you can stay on a Specific Purpose Work Visa How long you can stay in New Zealand depends on how long you need to be here to complete your specific purpose or event.

## How long you can stay on a Specific Purpose Work Visa
How long you can stay in New Zealand depends on how long you need to be here to complete your specific purpose or event.
